design_philosophy: E1 Anti-AI Designer logic. Functional, hyper-crisp, high-contrast monochrome UI (Notion-esque) with very specific red/accent triggers.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 fixed top-0 left-0 h-screen bg-[#191919] border-r border-white/10 z-40
layout_and_spacing.main_content: ml-64 p-8 min-h-screen bg-[#191919] flex flex-col gap-8
layout_and_spacing.card_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

employee_card.container: relative bg-[#2F2F2F] rounded-xl border border-white/10 p-5 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg
employee_card.avatar: w-14 h-14 rounded-full object-cover border border-white/20
employee_card.status_dot: w-3 h-3 rounded-full absolute bottom-0 right-0 border-2 border-[#2F2F2F]
employee_card.name: font-bold text-white truncate text-base
employee_card.department: text-xs text-[#B3B3B3] mt-1 truncate px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/5 rounded w-max

button.fab: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#E53935] hover:bg-[#F44336] text-white rounded-full p-4 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2 z-50 transition-colors
button.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-medium rounded-lg px-4 py-2
button.secondary: bg-[#2F2F2F] text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2
button.danger: bg-[#E53935] text-white hover:bg-[#F44336] rounded-lg px-4 py-2

components.inputs: bg-[#191919] border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-[#B3B3B3] rounded-lg focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 transition-all
components.modal: bg-[#2F2F2F] border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl text-white

tabs.list: bg-[#191919] p-1 rounded-lg border border-white/10 w-full inline-flex
tabs.trigger: flex-1 text-sm font-medium text-[#B3B3B3] data-[state=active]:bg-[#2F2F2F] data-[state=active]:text-white rounded-md py-1.5 transition-all

table.header_cell: text-xs font-medium text-[#B3B3B3] uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4

logo.alt: GrowItUp logo (blue gradient bar chart icon)

login_background.usage: Full width/height background for the login page with a bg-black/60 overlay

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='employee-card', data-testid='add-employee-fab', data-testid='delete-confirm-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a standard React app using Tailwind CSS. Apply Shadcn UI components but heavily override their styles to match the dark `#2F2F2F` surface and `#191919` background.
Do not use default white cards; adapt all Dialogs, Cards, and DropdownMenus to have a bg-[#2F2F2F] and a border-white/10.

The login page must use 'login_background' as a full-screen image with an overlay (`bg-black/60`). The login card itself should be glassmorphic (`bg-[#2F2F2F]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10`) containing ONLY the Google Sign-In button.
For the main dashboard, strictly adhere to the left sidebar layout (width 64).
Employee Cards must render in a 4-column grid (`xl:grid-cols-4`). Implement the card design exactly as described in `layout_and_spacing.employee_card`.
The 'Add New Employee' button must be a fixed FAB anchored to the bottom right (`bottom-8 right-8`), using the `accent_primary` red color (`#E53935`).
The 3-dot menu should use Shadcn DropdownMenu, placed inside the employee card top right (`absolute top-4 right-4`).
Employee Add/Edit is a modal Dialog containing Tabs (Personal Info, Work Info, Bank Info).
Departments and Job Positions pages should display standard list/table views using the custom table classes.
Provide confirmation dialog on employee deletion with the danger button styling.
